node.text: Nate won an international tournament in gaming, turning his passion into a career.

node.text: Nate won his first video game tournament playing a team shooter game called Counter-Strike: Global Offensive.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "Nate") on Nate (Score: 1.00)

node.text: Nate won a big Valorant tournament making him the champion.

node.text: Nate won his fourth video game tournament online and is proud to make money doing what he loves.
